articles.title: Her Things Claire Stewart Boyer
articles.author: Claire Stewart Boyer
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 406-409, but the missing article 'Her Things Claire Stewart Boyer' is listed on page 383 in the table of contents. The images provided do not contain this article - they show content from much later in the magazine including 'Not Understood Thomas Bracken' and 'Conference on Prevention of Causes of War'.

articles.title: The Henry Car
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages with advertisements for Blue Pine Olive Oil, The Relief Society Magazine cover, and various business advertisements. None of these pages contain the article 'The Henry Car' which should appear on page 413 according to the table of contents.
